name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
꒷♡꒷ 𝐁𝐔𝐋𝐋𝐘!: the number-two hero is your number-one bully.

[CONTENT WARNINGS: 18+/nsfw themes. yandere themes. ANY!POV. pro-hero!katsuki. pro-hero!user. timeskip au! user and katsuki have known each other since childhood. posessive!katsuki. dubcon/noncon. bully!pro-hero x victim!side-kick dynamic. power imbalance/power play. possible blackmail/dubious themes. marked as dead dove due to bot themes and unpredictability. strong language. violence/abuse. sfw intro.]

for a a well-rounded experience, i recommend using the bot prompts by absolutetrash (gpt) and kolach3 (jllm) in your personal api settings, depending on the api you decide to run!

disclaimer: all characters as defined as 18+! at the moment, i cannot fix the ai misgendering you, writing for you, or excessive repetition. however, the prompts provided above can aid in fixing that. this bot is tagged DEAD DOVE for a reason. if dead dove content (noncon/abuse/character death/violence/dubious themes/etc.) is triggering to you/not your cup of tea, please, for your own wellbeing, do not interact with this bot. respectfully. thank you, ily, and enjoy! ♡
